// ==== Billing/Abstractions/IUnitOfWork.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>Transactional boundary over this context's aggregate repositories.</summary>
public interface IUnitOfWork
{
    IOrderRepository Orders { get; }

    Task<int> SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// ==== Billing/Entities/Customer.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Billing;

public sealed class Customer
{
    public CustomerId Id { get; }
    public string Name { get; }
    public Email Email { get; }

    public Customer(CustomerId id, string name, Email email)
    {
        Id = id;
        Name = name;
        Email = email;
    }

    public bool Equals(Customer? other)
        => other is not null && Id.Equals(other.Id);
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as Customer);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Id.GetHashCode();
    public static bool operator ==(Customer? left, Customer? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(Customer? left, Customer? right)
        => !(left == right);
}

// ==== Billing/Enums/Currency.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>A type-safe smart enum: static instances with value equality.</summary>
public sealed class Currency : IEquatable<Currency>
{
    public static readonly Currency EUR = new("EUR", 0);
    public static readonly Currency USD = new("USD", 1);
    public static readonly Currency GBP = new("GBP", 2);

    public string Name { get; }
    public int Value { get; }

    private Currency(string name, int value)
    {
        Name = name;
        Value = value;
    }

    public static IReadOnlyList<Currency> All { get; } = new[] { EUR, USD, GBP };

    public static Currency FromName(string name)
        => All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Name == name)
            ?? throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(name), $"No Currency with name '{name}'.");

    public static Currency FromValue(int value)
        => All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Value == value)
            ?? throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(value), $"No Currency with value {value}.");

    public static bool TryFromName(string name, out Currency result)
    {
        result = All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Name == name)!;
        return result is not null;
    }

    public static bool TryFromValue(int value, out Currency result)
    {
        result = All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Value == value)!;
        return result is not null;
    }

    public TResult Match<TResult>(
        Func<TResult> eUR,
        Func<TResult> uSD,
        Func<TResult> gBP)
        => Value switch
        {
            0 => eUR(),
            1 => uSD(),
            2 => gBP(),
            _ => throw new InvalidOperationException($"Unhandled Currency '{Name}'.")
        };

    public void Switch(
        Action eUR,
        Action uSD,
        Action gBP)
    {
        switch (Value)
        {
            case 0: eUR(); break;
            case 1: uSD(); break;
            case 2: gBP(); break;
            default: throw new InvalidOperationException($"Unhandled Currency '{Name}'.");
        }
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => Name;
    public bool Equals(Currency? other)
        => other is not null && Value == other.Value;
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as Currency);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Value;
    public static bool operator ==(Currency? left, Currency? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(Currency? left, Currency? right)
        => !(left == right);
}

// ==== Billing/Enums/OrderStatus.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>A type-safe smart enum: static instances with value equality.</summary>
public sealed class OrderStatus : IEquatable<OrderStatus>
{
    public static readonly OrderStatus Draft = new("Draft", 0);
    public static readonly OrderStatus Placed = new("Placed", 1);
    public static readonly OrderStatus Shipped = new("Shipped", 2);
    public static readonly OrderStatus Cancelled = new("Cancelled", 3);

    public string Name { get; }
    public int Value { get; }

    private OrderStatus(string name, int value)
    {
        Name = name;
        Value = value;
    }

    public static IReadOnlyList<OrderStatus> All { get; } = new[] { Draft, Placed, Shipped, Cancelled };

    public static OrderStatus FromName(string name)
        => All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Name == name)
            ?? throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(name), $"No OrderStatus with name '{name}'.");

    public static OrderStatus FromValue(int value)
        => All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Value == value)
            ?? throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(value), $"No OrderStatus with value {value}.");

    public static bool TryFromName(string name, out OrderStatus result)
    {
        result = All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Name == name)!;
        return result is not null;
    }

    public static bool TryFromValue(int value, out OrderStatus result)
    {
        result = All.FirstOrDefault(e => e.Value == value)!;
        return result is not null;
    }

    public TResult Match<TResult>(
        Func<TResult> draft,
        Func<TResult> placed,
        Func<TResult> shipped,
        Func<TResult> cancelled)
        => Value switch
        {
            0 => draft(),
            1 => placed(),
            2 => shipped(),
            3 => cancelled(),
            _ => throw new InvalidOperationException($"Unhandled OrderStatus '{Name}'.")
        };

    public void Switch(
        Action draft,
        Action placed,
        Action shipped,
        Action cancelled)
    {
        switch (Value)
        {
            case 0: draft(); break;
            case 1: placed(); break;
            case 2: shipped(); break;
            case 3: cancelled(); break;
            default: throw new InvalidOperationException($"Unhandled OrderStatus '{Name}'.");
        }
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => Name;
    public bool Equals(OrderStatus? other)
        => other is not null && Value == other.Value;
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as OrderStatus);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Value;
    public static bool operator ==(OrderStatus? left, OrderStatus? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(OrderStatus? left, OrderStatus? right)
        => !(left == right);
}

// ==== Billing/Order.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

public sealed class Order : IAggregateRoot
{
    public OrderId Id { get; }
    public CustomerId Customer { get; }
    public IReadOnlyList<OrderLine> Lines { get; }
    public OrderStatus Status { get; }

    public Order(OrderId id, CustomerId customer, IReadOnlyList<OrderLine> lines, OrderStatus? status = null)
    {
        status ??= OrderStatus.Draft;

        Id = id;
        Customer = customer;
        Lines = new List<OrderLine>(lines).AsReadOnly();
        Status = status;

        CheckInvariants();
    }

    /// <summary>Validates every invariant; run after construction and each state change.</summary>
    private void CheckInvariants()
    {
        if (Lines.Count == 0 && !(Status == OrderStatus.Draft))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "status == Draft when lines.isEmpty");
        }
    }

    public bool Equals(Order? other)
        => other is not null && Id.Equals(other.Id);
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as Order);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Id.GetHashCode();
    public static bool operator ==(Order? left, Order? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(Order? left, Order? right)
        => !(left == right);
}

// ==== Billing/Repositories/IOrderRepository.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Order aggregate root.</summary>
public interface IOrderRepository
{
    Task<Order?> GetByIdAsync(OrderId id, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task AddAsync(Order aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task UpdateAsync(Order aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task RemoveAsync(Order aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/CustomerId.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>A strongly-typed identity value object.</summary>
public sealed class CustomerId : ValueObject
{
    public Guid Value { get; }

    public CustomerId(Guid value)
        => Value = value;

    public static CustomerId New()
        => new(Guid.NewGuid());

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Value;
    }
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/Email.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

public sealed class Email : ValueObject
{
    public string Raw { get; }

    public Email(string raw)
    {
        if (!Regex.IsMatch(raw, @"^[^@]+@[^@]+$"))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Email),
                rule: "invalid email address");
        }

        Raw = raw;
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Email {{ Raw = {Raw} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Raw;
    }
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/Money.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

public sealed class Money : ValueObject
{
    public decimal Amount { get; }
    public Currency Currency { get; }

    public Money(decimal amount, Currency currency)
    {
        if (amount < 0)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Money),
                rule: "a monetary amount cannot be negative");
        }

        Amount = amount;
        Currency = currency;
    }

    public static Money operator *(Money left, int right)
        => new Money(left.Amount * right, left.Currency);

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Money {{ Amount = {Amount}, Currency = {Currency} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Amount;
        yield return Currency;
    }
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/OrderId.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>A strongly-typed identity value object.</summary>
public sealed class OrderId : ValueObject
{
    public Guid Value { get; }

    public OrderId(Guid value)
        => Value = value;

    public static OrderId New()
        => new(Guid.NewGuid());

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Value;
    }
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/OrderLine.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

public sealed class OrderLine : ValueObject
{
    public ProductId Product { get; }
    public int Quantity { get; }
    public Money UnitPrice { get; }

    public OrderLine(ProductId product, int quantity, Money unitPrice)
    {
        Product = product;
        Quantity = quantity;
        UnitPrice = unitPrice;
    }

    public Money Subtotal
        => UnitPrice * Quantity;

    public override string ToString()
        => $"OrderLine {{ Product = {Product}, Quantity = {Quantity}, UnitPrice = {UnitPrice} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Product;
        yield return Quantity;
        yield return UnitPrice;
    }
}

// ==== Billing/ValueObjects/ProductId.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Billing;

/// <summary>A strongly-typed identity value object.</summary>
public sealed class ProductId : ValueObject
{
    public Guid Value { get; }

    public ProductId(Guid value)
        => Value = value;

    public static ProductId New()
        => new(Guid.NewGuid());

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Value;
    }
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/DomainInvariantViolationException.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Thrown when a domain invariant or illegal state transition is violated.</summary>
public sealed class DomainInvariantViolationException : Exception
{
    public string TypeName { get; }
    public string Rule { get; }

    public DomainInvariantViolationException(string type, string rule)
        : base($"Invariant violated on {type}: {rule}") { TypeName = type; Rule = rule; }
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/IAggregateRoot.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Marks an entity as the consistency boundary (root) of an aggregate.</summary>
public interface IAggregateRoot { }

// ==== Koine/Runtime/ValueObject.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Base class for value objects: equality by component value, not reference.</summary>
public abstract class ValueObject
{
    /// <summary>The values that define this value object's identity, in order.</summary>
    protected abstract IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents();

    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
    {
        if (obj is null || obj.GetType() != GetType())
        {
            return false;
        }
        return GetEqualityComponents().SequenceEqual(((ValueObject)obj).GetEqualityComponents());
    }

    public override int GetHashCode()
    {
        var hash = new HashCode();
        foreach (var component in GetEqualityComponents())
            hash.Add(component);
        return hash.ToHashCode();
    }

    public static bool operator ==(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);

    public static bool operator !=(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => !(left == right);

    /// <summary>Wraps an ordered collection (list) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Ordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: true);

    /// <summary>Wraps an unordered collection (set/map) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Unordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: false);

    private sealed class SequenceComponent
    {
        private readonly List<object?> _items = new();
        private readonly bool _ordered;

        public SequenceComponent(System.Collections.IEnumerable items, bool ordered)
        {
            _ordered = ordered;
            foreach (var item in items) _items.Add(item);
        }

        public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        {
            if (obj is not SequenceComponent other || _items.Count != other._items.Count)
            {
                return false;
            }
            return _ordered
                ? _items.SequenceEqual(other._items)
                : _items.All(x => _items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)) == other._items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)));
        }

        public override int GetHashCode()
        {
            if (_ordered)
            {
                var hash = new HashCode();
                foreach (var item in _items) hash.Add(item);
                return hash.ToHashCode();
            }
            var acc = 0;
            foreach (var item in _items) acc ^= item?.GetHashCode() ?? 0;
            return acc;
        }
    }
}
